summary: Update mode testing: Verified fix for drag-and-drop to center (make child / demote operation) bug. The /api/equipment-hierarchy/nodes/{id}/move endpoint is now working correctly. Added 3 new API tests specifically for the move endpoint (demote operation, valid hierarchy, invalid hierarchy validation). All 11 DnD tests pass. All 34 equipment hierarchy backend tests pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for drag-and-drop to center (demote operation) verified. The /move API endpoint now works correctly - returns 200 with updated node when called with node_id, new_parent_id, and recalculate_criticality in body. Tests verify: 1) Move endpoint changes parent_id correctly, 2) ISO 14224 hierarchy validation works (rejects invalid parent-child relationships), 3) Visual DnD shows 'Drop as child' feedback when dragging to center of a node. Updated test files use ISO 14224 standard level names (plant_unit, section_system, equipment_unit, subunit) instead of legacy names (unit, system, equipment).
rca_of_issue: Original bug: The @api_router.post decorator for /equipment-hierarchy/nodes/{node_id}/move endpoint was accidentally removed when adding the reorder-to endpoint. The route decorator has been restored and the move API now works correctly.
